text_block_list.text: Just as morning classes are about to start...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wait! Wait for meee! Don't close the gate!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Did I make it? Whew! I made it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, I'm not okay! Because both of my...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have two alarm clocks that I set every night, and
somehow, both of their batteries died at the same
time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They say to always have a spare, but I think my
spare needs a spare! And I'll need to verify all
three are working before going to sleep every―

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right, thanks! Urk! Maybe I can still make it in
time!

Her usual grace and wisdom seemingly gone, Biwa
Hayahide runs toward the school building with her
wild locks trailing behind her like a comet tail.
